Aug 4

[![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/w_36,c_scale,f_png,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack.com%2Ficon%2FLucideHeart%3Fv%3D4%26height%3D36%26fill%3Dnone%26stroke%3D%2523808080%26strokeWidth%3D2)](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4&post_id=147112919&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjoxNjI4MTA3MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQ3MTEyOTE5LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTcyMjc4NDU1OSwiZXhwIjoxNzI1Mzc2NTU5LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNCIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.YtU7K_CyWzZXdC0i1hm-nY78i24L4xVYfZnPU2RgJT0&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=9oyk0)[![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/w_36,c_scale,f_png,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack.com%2Ficon%2FLucideComments%3Fv%3D4%26height%3D36%26fill%3Dnone%26stroke%3D%2523808080%26strokeWidth%3D2)](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4&post_id=147112919&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjoxNjI4MTA3MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQ3MTEyOTE5LCJpYXQiOjE3MjI3ODQ1NTksImV4cCI6MTcyNTM3NjU1OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.JTlOAmj-T0LfrkPj7tk6W2gB1QR5QKKNxCXRTY9pkCM&r=9oyk0&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)[![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/w_36,c_scale,f_png,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack.com%2Ficon%2FLucideShare2%3Fv%3D4%26height%3D36%26fill%3Dnone%26stroke%3D%2523808080%26strokeWidth%3D2)](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4&post_id=147112919&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=9oyk0&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjoxNjI4MTA3MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQ3MTEyOTE5LCJpYXQiOjE3MjI3ODQ1NTksImV4cCI6MTcyNTM3NjU1OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.JTlOAmj-T0LfrkPj7tk6W2gB1QR5QKKNxCXRTY9pkCM)[![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/w_36,c_scale,f_png,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack.com%2Ficon%2FNoteForwardIcon%3Fv%3D4%26height%3D36%26fill%3Dnone%26stroke%3D%2523808080%26strokeWidth%3D2)](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvcGV0aXRpb24vcC9wanQtcGFydG5lcnMtbGlhYmlsaXR5LW1hbmFnZW1lbnQ_.tzljJNZ9RSD1zyrRnDIRUnqw7cfuRzJmCwj8Ck11fd0?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)[READ IN APP![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/w_36,c_scale,f_png,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack.com%2Ficon%2FLucideArrowUpRight%3Fv%3D4%26height%3D36%26fill%3Dnone%26stroke%3D%2523808080%26strokeWidth%3D2)](https://open.substack.com/pub/petition/p/pjt-partners-liability-management?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store)

**PJT Partners Inc. ($PJT)** was the first RX-relevant investment bank to [report Q2’24 earnings](https://substack.com/redirect/ad858f2e-b95a-4b7e-9708-aa6596e542bc?j=eyJ1IjoiOW95azAifQ.3I-y5PDezjo-i0ls31AGTIH4E8sNNl31puiktHvNIm8) and …

[![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/w_480,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_lossy/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F952390d7-a6d0-4f27-9441-427d191ee291_480x240.gif)](https://substack.com/redirect/1b1d2f0d-a639-4fec-a9cf-5eb9878e0288?j=eyJ1IjoiOW95azAifQ.3I-y5PDezjo-i0ls31AGTIH4E8sNNl31puiktHvNIm8)

Source: GIPHY

… these guys crushed it.

[![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/w_500,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_lossy/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F40de5cf6-fc61-412c-b3df-86cdff80889c_500x240.gif)](https://substack.com/redirect/19c284fa-a8fb-4c6b-a58a-f62ea3dae9e5?j=eyJ1IjoiOW95azAifQ.3I-y5PDezjo-i0ls31AGTIH4E8sNNl31puiktHvNIm8)

Source: GIPHY

That’s right. A tip of the hat to the very same dudes — here, PJT’s **Steve Zelin** — who jab about lawyers making too much money …

[![](https://substackcdn.com/image/youtube/w_550,c_limit/l_youtube_play_qyqt8q,w_120/sRTc6v2hSk8)](https://substack.com/redirect/2d7d4b48-5c11-4997-9fc6-0ebbb779814e?j=eyJ1IjoiOW95azAifQ.3I-y5PDezjo-i0ls31AGTIH4E8sNNl31puiktHvNIm8)

… yet rake in *record* revenues, LOL.\* ...
